name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12657 Yellow] This Multiple wallet releases a modern style with Monogram Heritage canvas, delicately showcasing original Damier pattern details such as crosshatch textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo. 9 x 1.5 x 11.5 cm (H x W x L)
